final:
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input rst,
  input [7:0] data_in,
  output reg [7:0] data_out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
      data_out <= 8'b0;
    end else begin
      data_out <= data_in;
    end
  end

endmodule
